content: Einführung einer **AI Usage Policy** als Pflichtlektüre mit digitaler Signatur. Technisches Enforcement via DLP-Tools die Uploads sensibler Daten zu externen KI-Diensten blockieren.
content_en: Introduce an **AI Usage Policy** as mandatory reading with digital signature. Technical enforcement via DLP tools blocking uploads of sensitive data to external AI services.

content: Wir haben ein **internes KI-Gateway** gebaut das alle Anfragen über einen Proxy leitet. Sensible Daten werden vor dem API-Call redaktiert — [mehr dazu](https://example.com).
content_en: We built an **internal AI gateway** routing all requests through a proxy. Sensitive data is redacted before the API call.

content: A structured **AI risk register** aligned with ISO 31000 provides a common language across departments. Define risk appetite at board level first — everything else follows.
content_en: A structured **AI risk register** aligned with ISO 31000 provides a common language across departments. Define risk appetite at board level first — everything else follows.

content: Implement a **confidence score threshold** for all chatbot responses. Below 0.85 confidence, the bot escalates to a human agent rather than answering autonomously.
content_en: Implement a **confidence score threshold** for all chatbot responses. Below 0.85 confidence, the bot escalates to a human agent rather than answering autonomously.

content: Erstelle ein **KI-Systemregister** als zentrales Google Sheet mit Owner, Tool-Name, Datenklasse und Risk-Level. Quartalsweise Review durch IT-Security und Datenschutz.
content_en: Create an **AI systems register** as a central spreadsheet with owner, tool name, data class and risk level. Quarterly review by IT security and data protection.
